title: I am 60 years old and have been involved in investing and trading for 20 years. My personal account assets exceed $7 million.
author: Evening_Office_3032
selftext:
I am 60 years old, and my personal investment account has just surpassed the $7 million mark.



I primarily invest in stocks, such as Nvidia, Tesla, Google, Apple, ETFs, and other companies of various sizes, including some tech stocks and a significant amount of cryptocurrencies. This is the main reason my assets have reached this level.



My main advanced indicator strategy is a reversal trading strategy: identifying overbought or oversold conditions in the market and looking for trading opportunities when the stock price reverses. When the stock price makes a new low (or high), but technical indicators (such as RSI, MACD, etc.) do not make a new low (or high), this "divergence" is usually a signal of a price reversal. This strategy is based on changes in market sentiment, meaning that after reaching extreme states, stock prices tend to reverse and return to a more reasonable price range.



I have three sons and one daughter, all of whom are married and successful in their careers. My wife suffers from osteoporosis. Perhaps in the future, I will choose to retire and spend more time and energy with my wife, traveling with her and seeing the world. This is perhaps a husband's responsibility. Thank you for patiently reading this article. I wish you all a happy life! Likes and comments are welcome.

comments.author: upvotes2doge
comments.body: Can your strategy be automated? I write software and I’ve written a few bots.

comments.author: TanukiSuitMario
comments.body: What does this have to do with AI trading?

comments.author: WorldPeaceStyle
comments.body: There is such a Formula to post like these, but reads like LLm slop. Whats the end game here build up karma for a Bot farm.

comments.author: AcanthisittaDull7639
comments.body: How much did you start trading with 20 yrs ago?

comments.author: stereotomyalan
comments.body:
Happy for you bro.

Unrelated but try glycine supplementation for osteoporosis. It's an essential aminoacid for cartillage, bones and skin. 5-20 grams/day.

Also add NAC to the mix if you want to boos gluthotione.

comments.author: Ok_Painter_4792
comments.body: Well you invested in criminal enterprises that have harmed humanity much more than they've done any good, and you have profited from that, a lot... but... you helped them more than they helped you and your progeny. So another way to look at it, and yes, I get it, this is just something that our older generation also did not generally consider, and much less today's youth, you thought you are stake holder in the system. Indeed, then as a stake holder, there is an ultimate price to pay unless you repent and give that wealth into causes that those corporations oppose -- i.e. genuine ones that help people directly at the grass roots. You can travel to some poorer countries, holiday destinations not far from you, and go off the beaten track, and talk to people, see their suffering, and see what you can do to help such communities, directly, putting in place something that will last and outlive you, God Willing. This is my honest opinion after a life time of observing, and I'm even older than you, which is surely a rarity on Reddit.

comments.author: BoardSuspicious4695
comments.body: What’s the point of this? You’re 60? You like RSI and others? You have a sick wife? You have successful children?

comments.author: Top_Boysenberry_6552
comments.body: fakest shit i've seen all day

comments.author: Responsible-Still-67
comments.body: If I had $7 million dollars at your age and had a sick wife, I love, I would ( not probably) choose to retire and spend more “time and energy “ with her!

comments.author: Axirohq
comments.body: Impressive track record and thoughtful approach both in trading and in life. It’s inspiring to see someone balance advanced strategies with family priorities and long-term planning. Wishing you and your family continued success and happiness!
